goal: Close the Phase Scanner runtime decision so implementation can start from explicit deterministic and LLM-supported boundaries.
claims: BP-001 records Phase Scanner v0 as a hybrid runtime decision.
BP-001 defines deterministic gates, LLM-supported sections, confidence calculation, known_risks handling, MVP outputs, and fail behavior.
BP-001 creates a review packet with typed WLP evidence.
assumptions: BP-001 is a governance decision task, not a runtime implementation task.
The current Phase Scanner spec remains the canonical check taxonomy for this task.
No package, verifier, source, or runtime file change is required for BP-001.
dod: contracts/BP-001.json exists and constrains this task to exactly the BP-001 governance artifacts.
docs/PHASE_SCANNER_RUNTIME_DECISION_v0.md answers the seven runtime decision questions listed in the handoff.
review-packets/BP-001.md records preflight, changed files, DoD, claims, assumptions, evidence, drift, auditor findings, self-score, decision, and reuse note.
node tools/verify-task-lock.cjs BP-001 --verify exits 0 with all changed files inside ALLOWED_FILES.
stop_conditions: A Phase Scanner implementation is needed to complete the task
A package, verifier, source, runtime, or existing spec edit becomes necessary
prior_task_findings: Bootstrap kept the hardened verifier instead of overwriting it with older package material; BP-001 must preserve WLP scope discipline and not start implementation.
